hooks.command: echo '[AGENTS] Start: researcher | End: code-reviewer (+ security-sentinel if auth/secrets)' >&2; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(npm run dev|pnpm dev|yarn dev|bun run dev)'; then if [ -z "$TMUX" ]; then echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Dev server must run in tmux' >&2; echo '[Hook] Use: tmux new-session -d -s dev "npm run dev"' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then if [ ! -f /tmp/.claude-review-passed ]; then echo '[BLOCKED] code-reviewer has NOT been run yet. Launch code-reviewer agent first, then retry.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.md ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *README* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *CLAUDE* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */docs/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */plans/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */solutions/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */memory/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */agents/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */rules/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */skills/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != */commands/* ]]; then echo '[Hook] Blocking unnecessary .md file. Use docs/, plans/, or solutions/.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then which black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; which ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx ]]; then which prettier >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then if [ -f "tsconfig.json" ] || [ -f "../tsconfig.json" ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) if grep -q 'console.log' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[Hook] Warning: console.log detected in '"$FILE" >&2; fi;; esac; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); OUT=$(jq -r '.tool_output.output // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then URL=$(echo "$OUT" | grep -o 'https://github.com/[^ ]*pull/[0-9]*'); if [ -n "$URL" ]; then echo "[Hook] PR created: $URL" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; LOG=~/.claude/bash-commands.log; echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $CMD" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; [ $(wc -l < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 10000 ] && tail -5000 "$LOG" > "$LOG.tmp" && mv "$LOG.tmp" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
which terminal-notifier >/dev/null 2>&1 && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message 'Task complete' -sound default 2>/dev/null; exit 0

if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then if [ ! -f /tmp/.claude-review-passed ] && { git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | grep -qE '\.(py|ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then echo '[REVIEW MISSING] code-reviewer was NOT run. Git commit/push is BLOCKED until you run it.' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

OBS_DIR=$(find ~/.claude/homunculus/projects -name 'observations.jsonl' -newer /tmp/.claude-last-instinct-check 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$OBS_DIR" ]; then OBS_DIR=$(find ~/.claude/homunculus -maxdepth 1 -name 'observations.jsonl' -newer /tmp/.claude-last-instinct-check 2>/dev/null | head -1); fi; if [ -n "$OBS_DIR" ]; then COUNT=$(wc -l < "$OBS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); if [ "${COUNT:-0}" -ge 20 ]; then echo '[Instinct] Session generated '$COUNT' observations. Run /instinct-status or /evolve to analyze patterns.' >&2; fi; fi; touch /tmp/.claude-last-instinct-check 2>/dev/null; exit 0

TOOL=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); ERR=$(jq -r '.error // .tool_output.output // ""' 2>/dev/null | head -c 500); echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | FAIL | $TOOL | $ERR" >> ~/.claude/tool-failures.log 2>/dev/null; exit 0
MSG=$(jq -r '.message // "Notification"' 2>/dev/null); which terminal-notifier >/dev/null 2>&1 && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "$MSG" -sound default 2>/dev/null; exit 0

rm -f /tmp/.claude-review-passed 2>/dev/null; if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '=== GIT STATUS ===' && git status --short && echo '=== RECENT COMMITS ===' && git log --oneline -5; fi; exit 0

echo '=== PRE-COMPACTION SNAPSHOT ===' >&2; echo "Modified files: $(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')" >&2; echo "Staged files: $(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')" >&2; exit 0
